hero.title: Cold outreach that actually gets replies.
hero.subtitle: Reachquix combines AI-powered email sequences with a built-in CRM — so your team can send smarter, follow up faster, and close more deals.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.step1desc: Sync your Google Sheets or upload a CSV file
howItWorks.step2desc: Use AI to write personalized email sequences
howItWorks.step3desc: Set your schedule and let Reachquix do the work
howItWorks.step4desc: Monitor replies and manage deals in the CRM

features.title: Every feature you need to close more deals.
features.subtitle: Reachquix gives your sales team the complete toolkit — email automation, CRM, Google Sheets sync, AI writing, and more — all in one platform.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow. Cancel anytime.

about.title: Built by people who understand your market.
about.subtitle: We are not a Silicon Valley startup. We are a team based in Dubai, UAE — and we built Reachquix because we could not find a single outreach tool that actually worked for the Gulf market.
about.missionText: To give every business in the UAE and MENA region — from solo real estate agents to full-scale agencies — access to the same powerful outreach tools that Fortune 500 companies use. Without the Fortune 500 price tag.

contact.title: We would love to hear from you.
contact.subtitle: Whether you have a question, need help, or just want to say hello — our team is here and responds fast.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thank you! We received your message and will reply within 24 hours.

eva.welcome: Hi there! I am Eva, your Reachquix assistant. I can help you with questions about our platform, pricing, features, and getting started. What would you like to know?
eva.title: Eva
eva.fallback: Great question! Let me connect you with our team. Please email us at support@reachquix.com or leave your email and we will get back to you within a few hours.
